children.text: The head of each Federal agency shall adopt procedures necessary to assure that new Federal buildings meet or exceed the Federal building energy standards established under .section 6834 of this title

The Federal building energy standards established under shall apply to new buildings under the jurisdiction of the Architect of the Capitol. The Architect shall adopt procedures necessary to assure that such buildings meet or exceed such standards.section 6834 of this title

children.heading: Construction of new buildings
children.label: b Construction of new buildings
children.text: The head of a Federal agency may expend Federal funds for the construction of a new Federal building only if the building meets or exceeds the appropriate Federal building energy standards established under .section 6834 of this title
